codeReview.summary: The polish pass completes the new sidebar behavior, first-visit empty state, central-skill detail navigation, toast plumbing, and scan-directory toggle persistence. One user-feedback gap remains on the collection import path, but I did not find a blocking correctness issue in the shipped milestone code.

issues.description: This feature's error-toast sweep misses collection import failures. `handleImportFile` catches `importCollection(...)` errors and only calls `console.error(...)`, so an invalid JSON file or backend rejection leaves the user with no on-screen feedback even though the feature explicitly aimed to surface toast errors for failed collection operations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission guidance still tells workers to point `agent-browser` at `http://localhost:1420`, but this repository's actual dev surface is now port 24200.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md 'Testing & Validation Guidance' says to use `http://localhost:1420`, while `.factory/services.yaml` healthcheck uses `http://localhost:24200` and `src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` also targets port 24200. The navigation-and-polish handoff's interactive checks likewise used `http://localhost:24200`.

summary: Pass. The navigation polish work is functionally in place, but the sidebar's collection-import error path still bypasses the toast-based feedback pattern introduced elsewhere in this feature.
